title: Absentia
description: A random assortment of missing blocks
body:
![An assortment of missing blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dBIrfn40/images/107649bb1eae1753afa14c2d0549e7c740fe46c2.png)

Absentia is currently a small collection of mostly decorative blocks

Currently the mod includes basalt and netherrack stairs, concrete stairs and slabs, color variants of reinforced concrete which has vastly improved durability and blast resistance, and a few other odds and ends.

![Requires Fabric API](https://images2.imgbox.com/8e/38/bfInI5qv_o.png)
